site.title: Impresa Confidi
site.subtitle: Supporting Campania SMEs since 1998
site.description: Impresa Confidi SCpA — Cooperative joint-stock company. Collective guarantees, credit access and financial consultancy for SMEs in Campania, Italy.

hero.title: Growing together with your business
hero.subtitle: Since 1998 we provide guarantees, consultancy and credit access to SMEs in Campania. A non-profit cooperative, standing by entrepreneurs.

services.title: What we do
services.subtitle: Services designed to support SME growth

service1.title: Collective Guarantees
service1.desc: We provide collective guarantees to member SMEs to facilitate access to bank credit on favorable terms.

service2.title: Resto al Sud
service2.desc: We are an Invitalia-accredited entity for Resto al Sud applications. We guide you step by step through the application process.

service3.title: Financial Consultancy
service3.desc: We offer consultancy for preliminary investigation, submission and monitoring of financing through banks and the Guarantee Fund.

partners.title: Partners & Affiliates
partners.subtitle: We work with banks and institutions

footer.desc: IMPRESA CONFIDI SCpA — Non-profit cooperative joint-stock company. Manager of public guarantee funds for SMEs in Campania.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.subtitle: We are here to help
contact.address: Via Cappuccini 64, 80059 Torre del Greco (NA), Italy
